title: Post-071 Branch Decision For Validation-Surface Decomposition
objective: Choose the post-071 branch for resolving the shared operations-web browser validation surface without executing source/test work, opening simultaneous multi-worker execution, opening a second worker, approving migration, or mutating host/runtime/package surfaces.
decision_summary: Packet 070 established that current operations-web source/test slices are not multi-worker-safe because browser validation converges on `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`. Packet 072 selects Branch D as the truthful next branch: plan a bounded one-worker validation-surface decomposition that can determine whether the shared browser-smoke surface can be split into separate tracked validation files. This is planning authority only and does not open execution.
planning_floor: `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` remains the shared-risk blocking surface until decomposed by a later explicit execution packet.
The next planning packet must define exact file ownership, allowed test-only mutation surfaces, validation commands, and no-go boundaries.
No simultaneous multi-worker execution may open in this tranche.
No source/test execution may run before a later explicit execution packet authorizes a bounded one-worker decomposition slice.
No application-source change may be included unless the planning packet proves it is strictly required for decomposition.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Phase 5 073 - Bounded Validation-Surface Decomposition Planning
sql_permission_note: This decision packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, source/test execution, validation-surface decomposition execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, second-worker execution, slice widening, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05. Packet 072 selects Branch D, the validation-surface decomposition lane, as planning-only. It authorizes a later bounded planning packet to define whether and how `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` can be decomposed into disjoint tracked validation files, but it does not authorize source/test execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, migration, runtime/service mutation, package/lockfile mutation, installs, remote rewrite, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
